description_long: This object is a retail package of Borges brand 'Longaniza Chorizo & Pollo' sausages, featuring a black plastic tray with a clear film seal. The front of the package displays a vibrant, high-resolution image of grilled sausages on a wooden plate, accompanied by fresh herbs, and is surrounded by detailed product information, branding, and nutritional labeling. The tray itself is molded with four rounded compartments to securely hold the sausages, and the back and sides are plain, semi-glossy black plastic. The front label includes prominent white, blue, and red text, as well as a green 'Delicias' sub-brand logo. The packaging is designed for retail display and easy handling, with a flat base and slightly flared edges. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for supermarket shelves or urban food markets.
description: A black plastic retail tray of Borges 'Longaniza Chorizo & Pollo' sausages, sealed with a clear film and featuring colorful branding and product imagery on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed product label, branding, sausage imagery, and nutritional information.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and molded contours of the black plastic tray, with no visible labeling.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain, molded plastic tray with four rounded compartments and no graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tray's profile and sealed edge.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Borges' brand logo is visible on the front label, located at the top center, with white text on a red background and a black border. The 'Delicias' sub-brand logo is also present in green and yellow script.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front label clearly indicates 'Longaniza Chorizo & Pollo' (chorizo and chicken sausage) as the flavor, with supporting imagery of grilled sausages and herbs.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the front label, occupying the left and right sections of the package.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The front label features a 'FIVE STAR MEAT' promotional graphic with five white stars and bold text, located below the main product name.
